pipeline._comment: Stage 1: Read raw LiDAR point cloud. Replace PLACEHOLDER_INPUT with actual file path.
Stage 2: Ground classification using Cloth Simulation Filter. Parameters TBD — review PDAL CSF documentation before setting slope_smooth, resolution, and rigidness.
Stage 3: Height Above Ground normalization using nearest-neighbor ground interpolation. Adds HeightAboveGround dimension to each point.
Stage 4: Write normalized point cloud. Replace PLACEHOLDER_OUTPUT with actual output path.
